text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and I are on our way home from
shopping, when...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Look, Trainer! This'll be a great way to start the
new year off with a bang!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do! Tests of luck like these are perfect
for predicting how well the rest of the year's
going to go.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
With this, I can see if I'll be able to set a good
example for everyone as the chair of the
disciplinary committee!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna place my faith in this ticket we got
while shopping and hope for a good prize!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I meeean, ever since I met you, I have been working super hard, both in my committee duties and on the training track.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There's no way luck won't bless me with an
awesome prize after I've been such a good role
model!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's eyes sparkle with anticipation.
She's set her expectations so high, I can only
hope she'll be rewarded with something good...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory grasps the lever on the raffle
machine and turns it with gusto!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Come on, big prize!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wh... Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! Look, Trainer, look! I won the
grand prize!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! I really did do it! My hard work paid off in spades!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, my imagination's already running wild! Do
you think they’ll have wooden swords I can buy as
a souvenir at the inn?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, wait! I gotta pull myself together! If I'm
gonna go on a vacation, I gotta make sure it's the
ultimate vacation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Can you hold on to this coupon for me?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I know I've been putting my nose to the
grindstone all this time, but... I don't think I've
done enough to treat myself just yet!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
First, I gotta take on my hot-blooded rivals in the
best race ever! Only then can I go to the hot
spring!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
After all, knowing that I earned it through hard
work will make my reward all the sweeter!
choice_data_list: Okay. I'll hold on to it for now, then.
Okay. I'll hold on to it for now, then.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Now I've got one more reason to get
back to the grind—a memorable dip in a hot
spring while immersing myself in warm memories is
waiting for me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! And when that time comes, I hope we can
look back on all our old memories together!
That'd be the best!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Take good care of that coupon for me! Swear on
your soul you will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory vows to work even harder so she
can make her future vacation the best one ever.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh! A deluxe hamburger steak! What a luxurious first-place prize... Are you sure this isn't the grand prize?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah... My mouth is already watering! But I can't
keep this deliciousness to myself!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's split it! You know how they say you
should eat pork steak before a big match for
good luck? Let's eat this instead!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's get back to campus and cook this
bad boy up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Order up! One pipin' hot hamburger steak, ready
to be devoured!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I even thought up a cheer for us to make
sure we get all the luck we can!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
S! T! E-A-K!
If you want to win, that's the way!
Eaaat... steak!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can hardly wait to try it! What do you think?
Shall we dig in?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Then that settles it... It's CHOW TIME!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We dive into the steak, hoping it'll bring us good
fortune. But luck or no luck, it's as delicious as it
looks!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! We really get to take home this many
carrots?! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, there's no way I'll be able to eat all of
these by myself... But I know what I've gotta do!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Lady Luck must've helped me win so I can share
these with my rivals and help them power up too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! Let's get these back to the academy and
gather everyone up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gather round, everybody! I made this special
stamina-boosting carrot feast using my family's
recipes! Have as much as you want!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ooh... So many delicious carrots... Drool.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This will indeed fuel our bodies. Thank you,
Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps this meal will be the extra boost I need to
once again race down the track.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! You know what they say, "One
carrot today, a bushel tomorrow!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Bamboo Memory and her rivals eat
their fill, reenergizing themselves and gearing up
for their next races.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ooh! I was hoping for one of the other prizes, but this is a pretty nice carrot!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm! I think this is a sign that I've gotta
recharge my energy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And eating a hearty carrot like this is the best
way to do it! No time to waste! I'm eating it right
here and n—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wait, hang on. It'd be rude to just chow down on
a carrot in public like this. That's no good!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
As head of the disciplinary committee, I have to
be a good role model!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna sprint back to campus so I can eat this
without bothering anyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Bamboo Memory takes off at full
speed and happily enjoys her carrot in private.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I can't believe I lost! This sucks!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm... But you know what? I know exactly why this
happened! I can use these to wipe off my sweat
after I win my next race!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Or maybe they're for wiping my tears after
losing the raffle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is usually very positive, but
losing the raffle seems to have stung her a bit.
